function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system as required, and used canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Current date from context is 2026-03-31. Birthday search in 10_entities/cast shows the earliest upcoming month-day is 04-25; canonical record 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms the exact name Claudia Reiter and birthday 1981-04-25. A targeted search for '-04-25' found only claudia.md, so no tie exists.
